top_signals.title: Russia pounds Kyiv with missiles and drones in heavy overnight assault
top_signals.summary: Capital is rocked by explosions after Ukraine’s Zelenskyy warned of an imminent large-scale attack
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pilgrims from the West flock to hajj despite Mideast war
top_signals.summary: For many, the chance to perform the sacrosanct Muslim rite has taken precedence over the fears of instability caused by the war against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
